headline: James Dodges Bankruptcy with Million-Dollar Payout, Year of Lost Wages and More
articleBody:
James suffered a broken ankle after falling off a ladder at work. As a hemophiliac, this led to weeks of therapy and rehabilitation. His life was further complicated after recovering and visiting family in Guatemala.

Outcome: James received a million-dollar payout, a year of lost wages, and other benefits, allowing him to avoid bankruptcy.
